name: Esparragos Con Tomatillos (Asparagus with Tomatillos)
recipeIngredient: 4 large Tomatillos (about 1 1/2-inch diameter) husked, rinsed, and finely diced
1 small Pear-shaped tomato, cored and finely diced
1/4 cup Cojita, crumbled or finely shredded Parmesan cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Snap off and discard the tough ends of asparagus; rinse spears.
2. Pour water to a depth of 1 inch into a wide frying pan and bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Add asparagus and cook, uncovered, until barely tender when pierced (3 to 5 minutes); drain.
4. Immerse in ice water. When cool, drain again; arrange on a platter or on 4 salad plates.
5. Mix oil, tomatillos, and tomato; spoon over asparagus.
6. Sprinkle with cheese and garnish with lemon wedges. If desired, season to taste with salt and pepper. Makes 4 servings.
